bootstrap_note: 计划阶段首轮。codebuddy=评审者(is_developer=false)首轮持笔产出计划草案。commit_hash=final_diff commit。计划草案定义5个dev_phase循环对应§14 Phase 0-4。

milestones: Phase 2: 收敛+Issue (收敛引擎/Issue CRUD/模板引擎/盲审/提出者不修改校验)
Phase 3: 异常+归档 (崩溃恢复/僵持/lease/归档/pairflow.log/进程管理)
Phase 4: 端到端+质量 (E2E/质量评估)
plan_summary.quality_gates: 每个dev_phase: coding→review→收敛→盲审→checklist v2→final_diff→advance
